erDiagram
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    CUSTOMER {
        string name PK
        string email
    }
    ORDER {
        int id PK
        decimal total
    }
---
+---------------------+            +----------------------+
|      CUSTOMER       |            |        ORDER         |
+--------+-------+----+            +---------+-------+----+
| string | name  | PK |            | int     | id    | PK |
| string | email |    |            | decimal | total |    |
+--------+--+----+----+            +---------++------+----+
            +||-----------places------------o{+
